message:
perf(extensions): share registry snapshot across ExtensionManager reconstructions

- Add manager_snapshot (Arc<RwLock<Arc<RegistrySnapshot>>>) and
  manager_snapshot_version (Arc<AtomicU64>) fields to JsRuntimeHost
- Modify manager() method to reuse shared snapshot references instead
  of creating a new snapshot on every call — eliminates redundant
  deep copies of the extension registry on each hostcall dispatch
- Update JsExtensionRuntimeHandle::start() to pass snapshot references
  when constructing JsRuntimeHost
- Fix raw string literals in compatibility_scanner_comment_tests:
  r#"..."# → r"..." where no hashes are needed

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
